narrative:
Reynoldsburg 2-A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,201 registered voters, with 64.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.0%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.2 percentage points.
